subject: docs(mistakes): log stale source mistake — missed repos and wrong URLs
body:
Used repo-tor's projects.json as the canonical repo list instead of
querying the authenticated GitHub API with GITHUB_ALL_REPO_TOKEN.
Resulted in missing four-ems and sun-sea-o entirely, plus 5 stale
GitHub Pages URLs that should have been Vercel URLs. One API call
to /user/repos would have returned all 15 repos including private.

Tags: docs, mistakes, process
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 1
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: portfolio-site
